name: AI For Healthcare Payer — Provider Facing
description: Provider-facing health insurance virtual assistant for member plan info, coverage/eligibility, and claim status inquiries — ABL translation of Kore.ai 5-agent system

Healthcare_Supervisor.description: Greeting + auth-gated routing to specialized provider-facing agents

Authentication_Agent.description: Authenticates provider via Provider ID (9 digits) or NPI ID (10 digits)

Plan_Information_Agent.description: Retrieves member plan details: deductibles, OOP max, dates, status, benefits

Coverage_Information_Agent.description: Coverage/eligibility queries using plan name + knowledge base RAG

Claim_Information_Agent.description: Retrieves member claim status with optional date/status/amount filters
